title: Cherugudi Sukshmapureeswarar Temple
tagline: Cherugudi Sukshmapureeswarar Temple — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Cherugudi Sukshmapureeswarar Temple (செருகுடி சூட்சுமபுரீசுவரர் கோயில் ])is a Hindu temple located at Cherugudi in Tiruvarur district, Tamil Nadu, India.
overview.description: Cherugudi Sukshmapureeswarar Temple (செருகுடி சூட்சுமபுரீசுவரர் கோயில் ])is a Hindu temple located at Cherugudi in Tiruvarur district, Tamil Nadu, India. The presiding deity is Shiva. He is called as Sukshma Pureeswarar. His consort is known as Mangala Nayaki.

topPlaces.name: Serugudi Sukshmapureeswarar Temple
topPlaces.description: Serugudi Sukshmapureewarar Temple is a Hindu temple located in the village of Serugudi in the Tiruvarur district of Tamil Nadu, India. The presiding deity is Shiva.

topPlaces.name: Thirupampuram
topPlaces.description: Thirupampuram is a village in the Kudavasal taluk of Tiruvarur district, Tamil Nadu, India. The famous Ragu, Kethu temple is located in Tirupampuram.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Cherugudi Sukshmapureeswarar Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Cherugudi Sukshmapureeswarar Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Cherugudi Sukshmapureeswarar Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tiruchirappalli International Airport (98 km) and the nearest railway station is Tiruchirappalli Junction (100 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Cherugudi Sukshmapureeswarar Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Cherugudi Sukshmapureeswarar Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Cherugudi Sukshmapureeswarar Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Cherugudi Sukshmapureeswarar Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Cherugudi Sukshmapureeswarar Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Serugudi Sukshmapureeswarar Temple, Thirupampuram, Thiruveezhimizhalai, Anniyur Agnipureeswarar Temple, Paampuranathar Temple, Thirupampuram.
